channel.title: math on Fan Zhang
channel.description: Recent content in math on Fan Zhang

item.title: Algebraic Sturcture 101
item.description: Group Group Group: A group is a non-empty set $G$ with binary operation satisfying: Identity: exists $e \in G$ such as $ea = ae = a$ Inverse: for each $a \in G$, exists a $b \in G$ such as $ab = ba = e$ Associative: for all $a, b, c \in G$, we have $a(bc) = (ab)c$ Properties: Uniqueness of the identity: There is only one identity element Cancellation in a group: If $ab=ac$ or $ba=ca$, $b=c$ $$ ab = cb \

item.title: Group Exercise
item.description: Suppose that H is a subgroup of $S_n$ of odd order. Prove that H is a subgroup of $A_n$. Lemma: If H is a subgroup of $S_n$, then either every member of H is an even permutation or exactly half of the members are even. If there is no odd member, then every member of $H$ is an even permutation. If there is an odd member $a \in H$,
